Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Junpei's room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}By the time I noticed the door was halfway open, his room was already like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I've left the place untouched, as you requested.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Junpei Iori. A second-year student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I've been trying to reach him on his cell phone, but he hasn't responded in the last half hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It was careless of me to let my guard down. This dorm was attacked once in the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Perhaps Iori himself is at fault here, however, if harm has fallen upon him, as head of SEES I am accountable...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I hate to say it, Kirijo-san, but he most likely—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Wh-What the hell!? Kurosawa-san? What's going on here!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Where were you? I've been trying get a hold of you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Huh? Oh, uh... It was hot and the AC was busted, so I went to the manga café, but I fell asleep.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Well, I'm just glad you're safe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}So if it wasn't an attack, then it must have been theft. Why would the burglar target this room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}What else could it be? Someone clearly ransacked the place looking for something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Vandalizing a school dorm... When I find out who did this, I'll see to it that they face a swift execution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Well, son, sounds like you've got a death sentence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}How about it, Iori? Was this room really vandalized?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}This is... how my room always looks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}You can't possibly live like this, can you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Wh-What about the door? It was open.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Oh, that? I was just airin' the place out while I was gone. No one we don't know ever comes around, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I think this case is closed. May I get back to my duties now, young lady?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}I'm... sorry you had to witness something so disgraceful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}It seems I grew up more sheltered than I realized.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}You're not even gonna yell at me!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}And what's the deal with callin' the cops over a messy room, anyway!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}The hell did I do to deserve this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 10 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I drew that "Worst Luck" fortune on the way back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The recording ends here...[n]{f 1 1}
